title: Silverhook Chainsaw Oil, ISO100, 1 Litre, Amber
features: Reduces wear on all chainsaw blades
description: Silverhook ISO 100 Chainsaw Oil has been formulated using high viscosity base oils, special tacky modifiers, and anti fling agents to make it an excellent non-fling oil, making sure lubricant stays on the bar and chain. Silverhook Chainsaw Oil works with all types of pressure fed chainsaws and chain-driven agricultural/garden equipment where chain lubrication is required. For both electric and petrol engines.
